findings.location: s1 — テストクラス作成ルール / import statements
findings.description: The import paths for BatchRequestTestSupport are not captured. The source shows two different imports: `nablarch.test.core.batch.BatchRequestTestSupport` in the basic example and `nablarch.test.core.messaging.BatchRequestTestSupport` in the split-sheet example. This discrepancy in the source is decision-necessary information — an AI answering "which class to import" needs at least one (and ideally both) package paths to give a correct answer.
